name: Friendship Cake Mix Style One
recipeInstructions:
See recipe, Brandied Fruit Starter for Friendship Cake.
Combine pudding, oil, eggs and cake mix. Beat 3 minutes at medium speed.
With spoon, blend fruit, floured nuts and raisins into batter. Pour or spoon
into greased and floured Bundt pan. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes.
